title: Rename device - UI
scenario: Device Name setting is displayed in Device Settings - General section of Poly Studio Mobile app when a device is attached, per Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
Scroll to the General section within Device Settings.
expected: The 'Device Name' setting is present in the Device Settings - General section, matching the Figma design.
